name: Scout-TheBunker
short_description: Scout The Bunker Is a Horror Shooter Game That Takes Place In Russia in an Abandoned Soviet-Era Bunker.
detailed_description:
Scout The Bunker Is a Horror Shooter Game That Takes Place In Russia in an Abandoned Soviet-Era Bunker
Where The Protagonist Has To Collect Top-Secret Documents from The Bunker, While Fighting His Way Through
Phantoms And Super Natural Anomalies To Reach His Goal.
The Game Is Heavily Atmospheric In a Dark And Mysterious Environment,
Including Puzzles And Secrets That Requires The Player To Solve.
The Game Is Top-Down Shooter Horror Game With a Realistic Graphics Including a Quest-Map Menu To Navigate The Bunker, Beside a Simplified Inventory System To Manage Game Items From Quest Documents To Medkits and Mags To Eliminate Incoming Danger.
The Game Has Many Hazards (Ghosts - Phantoms - Mental Hallucinations and Deadly Phenomenon) Your Task Is To Avoid Them All or Eliminate 'em If Possible And Find Your Way To Quest Items And Get Out There ASAP.
